_description: Instantly SuperSearch filter construction. Count → Preview → Enrich pipeline.
_gotchas: keyword_filter.include is a STRING, not an array
Use level + department instead of title.include (title returns 0 results)
Preview returns names/titles ONLY, no emails
Enrich costs 1 credit per lead, needs a LEAD LIST ID with resource_type: 1

_step_1_count._description: Free. Use as decision gate before spending credits.

_step_2_preview._description: Free. Returns names and titles, NO emails. Use to validate filter quality.

_step_3_enrich._description: 1 CREDIT PER LEAD. Enriches into a lead list. Async - leads appear in list within seconds.
_step_3_enrich._curl: curl -s -X POST 'https://api.instantly.ai/api/v2/supersearch-enrichment/enrich-leads-from-supersearch' -H 'Authorization: Bearer $INSTANTLY_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{...filter + resource_id + resource_type...}'
_step_3_enrich._note: resource_type 1 = lead list. NOT campaign ID.

_field_map.job_titles.level: Seniority: Entry, Manager, Director, VP, C-Suite, Owner
_field_map.job_titles.department: Function: Marketing, Sales, Engineering, Finance, HR, Operations, etc.
_field_map.location.country: Full country name, not ISO code
_field_map.keyword_filter.include: STRING with OR/AND operators, not array
